title: Execution manager behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: only behavior delta: log level/message in cancellation grace path of ExecutionManager.stop()
local code emits info-level message with stream_id instead of warning noise

risk_signals.evidence: upstream warning-level line for pending cancellation tasks after 5s

decision_gate: prefer keep_local if lifecycle semantics unchanged and only warning-noise suppression differs
